checks.name: ceiling_close_issue
checks.description: close_issue only if (reader + reporter) OR writer

checks.name: ceiling_push
checks.description: Push access only for writers, blocked if repo is archived

checks.name: ceiling_edit_issue
checks.description: Edit issue only if (reader + reporter) OR writer

checks.name: floor_reporter_close
checks.description: Readers who ARE the reporter MUST be able to close their own issue

results.description: close_issue only if (reader + reporter) OR writer
results.counterexample:
✗ Policy set 1 implies policy set 2: DOES NOT HOLD
  Counterexample found:
principal: User::"", action: Action::"close_issue", resource: Issue::""
context: {}
entities: [
  Action::"assign_issue",
  Action::"edit_issue",
  Repository::"" {
    admins: UserGroup::"B",
    isArchived: true,
    maintainers: UserGroup::"C",
    readers: UserGroup::"",
    triagers: UserGroup::"D",
    writers: UserGroup::"A",
  },
  Action::"delete_issue",
  User::"",
  UserGroup::"B",
  UserGroup::"D",
  Action::"add_admin",
  Issue::"" {
    repo: Repository::"",
    reporter: User::"",
  },
  Action::"push",
  Action::"add_triager",
  Action::"fork",
  Action::"add_reader",
  Action::"add_maintainer",
  UserGroup::"C",
  Action::"close_issue",
  Action::"add_writer",
  UserGroup::"",
  Action::"pull",
  UserGroup::"A",
]
